step.title: Load product brief
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/product-brief.md and extract vision, goals, features, and constraints.

step.title: Discover functional requirements
step.action: Collaborate with the user to discover functional requirements from each feature in the brief.
Assign unique IDs (FR-001, FR-002, ...) to each requirement.

step.title: Define non-functional requirements
step.action: Define NFRs for performance, security, scalability, reliability, and usability.
Assign unique IDs (NFR-001, NFR-002, ...) to each NFR.

step.title: Write acceptance criteria
step.action: Write testable acceptance criteria for each functional requirement.

step.title: Define scope boundaries
step.action: Clearly define what is In Scope and Out of Scope for the release.

step.title: Produce PRD
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with requirements.
